# Sales Opportunity Talking Script

*Generated by Product Line Auto-Selection Pipeline*

下面是 20 个英文版 Sales → AI Agent 的测试样例。我刻意做成接近真实销售在 Teams 里语音输入的风格，包含：创建商机、更新已有商机、按产品维度拆分 TCV、模糊金额、多币种、多年合同、数量缺失、客户名歧义、stage 更新等场景。

⸻

1. New opportunity — hardware + services
Sales voice input
Create a new opportunity for Acme Manufacturing. The customer is planning a workplace refresh for about 1,200 laptops. Please estimate the laptop hardware at 1.44 million dollars, deployment services at 180,000, and premium support at 240,000. Total contract value should be 1.86 million dollars. Expected close is Q3 this year, probably September. Stage is early qualification.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_opportunity",
 "customer": "Acme Manufacturing",
 "opportunity_name": "Workplace Refresh",
 "stage": "Early Qualification",
 "expected_close": "Q3 / September",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 1860000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Laptops",
     "quantity": 1200,
     "amount": 1440000
   },
   {
     "category": "Professional Services",
     "product": "Deployment Services",
     "amount": 180000
   },
   {
     "category": "Support Services",
     "product": "Premium Support",
     "amount": 240000
   }
 ]
}

⸻

2. Update existing opportunity — add product allocation
Sales voice input
Open the latest opportunity for Global Retail Group and update the product breakdown. They are interested in 800 standard laptops, around 960,000 dollars, plus device-as-a-service for three years at 420,000 dollars, and managed support for 150,000 dollars. Please keep the total opportunity value at 1.53 million dollars.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Global Retail Group",
 "target_opportunity": "latest",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 1530000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Standard Laptops",
     "quantity": 800,
     "amount": 960000
   },
   {
     "category": "DaaS",
     "product": "Device-as-a-Service",
     "term": "3 years",
     "amount": 420000
   },
   {
     "category": "Managed Services",
     "product": "Managed Support",
     "amount": 150000
   }
 ]
}

⸻

3. Create opportunity — service-heavy solution
Sales voice input
Please create a new opportunity for Northstar Bank. This is mainly an infrastructure modernization project. The customer may buy consulting services worth 300,000 dollars, implementation services around 500,000 dollars, and ongoing managed services at 1.2 million dollars over three years. There may also be server hardware, roughly 400,000 dollars. Total contract value is about 2.4 million dollars.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_opportunity",
 "customer": "Northstar Bank",
 "opportunity_name": "Infrastructure Modernization",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 2400000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Consulting Services",
     "product": "Advisory / Consulting",
     "amount": 300000
   },
   {
     "category": "Professional Services",
     "product": "Implementation Services",
     "amount": 500000
   },
   {
     "category": "Managed Services",
     "product": "Ongoing Managed Services",
     "term": "3 years",
     "amount": 1200000
   },
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Server Hardware",
     "amount": 400000
   }
 ],
 "confidence_note": "Total equals sum of product amounts."
}

⸻

4. Ambiguous amount — agent should confirm
Sales voice input
Update the opportunity for Blue Ocean Logistics. They are considering about 500 tablets and some lifecycle services. I think the hardware is around 300K and the services are probably another 100K or 120K. For now put the total contract value as 420K, but mark the service amount as estimated.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Blue Ocean Logistics",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 420000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Tablets",
     "quantity": 500,
     "amount": 300000
   },
   {
     "category": "Lifecycle Services",
     "product": "Lifecycle Services",
     "amount": 120000,
     "amount_status": "estimated"
   }
 ],
 "agent_should_flag": "Service amount was expressed as 100K or 120K, but user chose total TCV 420K. Use 120K to balance total."
}

⸻

5. Create opportunity — multi-year TCV
Sales voice input
Create an opportunity for Bright Health. This is a three-year digital workplace managed service deal. Year one is 750,000 dollars, year two is 820,000, and year three is 900,000. The product should be recorded under managed services. Total contract value is 2.47 million dollars. Expected close date is December 15.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_opportunity",
 "customer": "Bright Health",
 "opportunity_name": "Digital Workplace Managed Services",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 2470000,
 "expected_close": "December 15",
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Managed Services",
     "product": "Digital Workplace Managed Services",
     "term": "3 years",
     "amount": 2470000,
     "yearly_breakdown": [
       {
         "year": 1,
         "amount": 750000
       },
       {
         "year": 2,
         "amount": 820000
       },
       {
         "year": 3,
         "amount": 900000
       }
     ]
   }
 ]
}

⸻

6. Existing opportunity — split TCV across hardware, software, support
Sales voice input
For the Contoso education opportunity I created this morning, please update the TCV split. Put 600,000 dollars under laptops, 250,000 under software licenses, and 150,000 under warranty extension. The total should be exactly 1 million dollars.

 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Contoso",
 "target_opportunity": "created_this_morning",

 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Laptops",
     "amount": 600000

   {
     "category": "Software",
     "product": "Software Licenses",
     "amount": 250000
   },
   {
     "category": "Warranty Services",
     "product": "Warranty Extension",
     "amount": 150000
   }
 ]
}

8. Agent interaction — clarify missing customer
Sales voice input
Please add 200 workstations at about 1,800 dollars each, plus 50,000 dollars for imaging services, to the opportunity we discussed yesterday.
Expected agent behavior
{
 "action": "clarification_required",
 "missing_fields": [
   "customer",
   "opportunity_name"
 ],
 "extracted_products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Workstations",
     "quantity": 200,
     "unit_price": 1800,
     "amount": 360000
   },
   {
     "category": "Professional Services",
     "product": "Imaging Services",
     "amount": 50000
   }
 ],
 "calculated_total": 410000,
 "suggested_agent_question": "Which customer or opportunity should I update?"
}

⸻

9. Opportunity update — stage and amount change
Sales voice input
Open the current opportunity for Green Valley Hospital. Move the stage from qualification to proposal. Also update the TCV from 900,000 to 1.15 million dollars. The increase is mainly from adding cybersecurity assessment services worth 250,000 dollars.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Green Valley Hospital",
 "target_opportunity": "current",
 "stage_change": {
   "from": "Qualification",
   "to": "Proposal"
 },
 "currency": "USD",
 "previous_total_contract_value": 900000,
 "new_total_contract_value": 1150000,
 "products_to_add": [
   {
     "category": "Security Services",
     "product": "Cybersecurity Assessment Services",
     "amount": 250000
   }
 ]
}

10. Create lead — not yet opportunity
Sales voice input
Create a new lead for Summit Airlines. They are exploring a device refresh next fiscal year, probably around 2,000 laptops. No confirmed budget yet, but based on similar deals the hardware could be around 2.4 million dollars and services could be another 300,000. Please mark this as a lead, not a qualified opportunity yet.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_lead",
 "customer": "Summit Airlines",
 "lead_name": "Device Refresh",
 "status": "Unqualified Lead",
 "currency": "USD",
 "estimated_total_contract_value": 2700000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Laptops",
     "quantity": 2000,
     "amount": 2400000,
     "amount_status": "estimated"
   },
   {
     "category": "Professional Services",
     "product": "Deployment / Related Services",
     "amount": 300000,
     "amount_status": "estimated"
   }
 ]
}

⸻

12. Negative test — total does not match product sum
Sales voice input
Update the Falcon Insurance opportunity. Put 700,000 dollars under hardware, 350,000 under software, and 250,000 under services. The total contract value should be 1.5 million dollars.
Expected agent behavior
{
 "action": "validation_required",
 "customer": "Falcon Insurance",
 "currency": "USD",
 "stated_total_contract_value": 1500000,
 "calculated_product_total": 1300000,
 "variance": 200000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "amount": 700000
   },
   {
     "category": "Software",
     "amount": 350000
   },
   {
     "category": "Services",
     "amount": 250000
   }
 ],
 "suggested_agent_question": "The product amounts add up to 1.3 million dollars, but you stated the total contract value as 1.5 million. Should I add another 200,000 dollars to a product category or update the total?"
}

16. Mixed confidence — low-confidence quantity
Sales voice input
For Pacific Food Group, create a preliminary opportunity. They mentioned maybe 300 to 400 rugged tablets for warehouse operations. Use 350 units as the working assumption. Hardware value around 280,000 dollars, warehouse setup services 85,000, and support 45,000. Total estimated TCV is 410,000 dollars.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_opportunity",
 "customer": "Pacific Food Group",
 "opportunity_name": "Warehouse Rugged Tablet Solution",
 "status": "Preliminary",
 "currency": "USD",
 "estimated_total_contract_value": 410000,
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "product": "Rugged Tablets",
     "quantity": 350,
     "quantity_status": "working_assumption",
     "original_quantity_range": "300-400",
     "amount": 280000
   },
   {
     "category": "Professional Services",
     "product": "Warehouse Setup Services",
     "amount": 85000
   },
   {
     "category": "Support Services",
     "product": "Support",
     "amount": 45000
   }
 ]
}

18. Forecast update — probability and close date
Sales voice input
Update the Quantum Labs opportunity. Keep the product values the same, but change the probability to 60 percent and move the expected close date from July to September. The customer is still evaluating the final managed services scope.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Quantum Labs",
 "fields_to_update": {
   "probability": 0.6,
   "expected_close": "September"
 },
 "fields_unchanged": [
   "product_values"
 ],
 "notes": "Customer is still evaluating final managed services scope."
}

⸻

19. New opportunity — customer gives budget, not exact split
Sales voice input
Create a new opportunity for Lakeview University. The customer has a total budget of about 2 million dollars for campus IT modernization. They expect roughly half to be hardware, 30 percent services, and 20 percent software. Please create the opportunity using those percentages for now.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "create_opportunity",
 "customer": "Lakeview University",
 "opportunity_name": "Campus IT Modernization",
 "currency": "USD",
 "total_contract_value": 2000000,
 "allocation_method": "percentage_based",
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "allocation_percentage": 50,
     "amount": 1000000
   },
   {
     "category": "Services",
     "allocation_percentage": 30,
     "amount": 600000
   },
   {
     "category": "Software",
     "allocation_percentage": 20,
     "amount": 400000
   }
 ]
}

⸻

20. Correction scenario — overwrite previous input
Sales voice input
Correction for the Nova Robotics opportunity. I said earlier the total was 750,000 dollars, but the customer updated the scope. Please change the TCV to 980,000 dollars. Put 500,000 under hardware, 280,000 under automation consulting, and 200,000 under managed services.
Expected data extraction
{
 "action": "update_opportunity",
 "customer": "Nova Robotics",
 "correction": true,
 "previous_total_contract_value": 750000,
 "new_total_contract_value": 980000,
 "currency": "USD",
 "products": [
   {
     "category": "Hardware",
     "amount": 500000
   },
   {
     "category": "Consulting Services",
     "product": "Automation Consulting",
     "amount": 280000
   },
   {
     "category": "Managed Services",
     "amount": 200000
   }
 ]
}

⸻

我建议你们测试 agent 的时候，不要只看它能不能识别金额，而是重点看这几个能力：
能否判断 action：create lead / create opportunity / update opportunity / correction / clarification required。
能否把 TCV 拆到产品维度：hardware、software、professional services、managed services、support、warranty、training 等。
能否校验金额：产品金额加总是否等于 TCV。
能否处理模糊语音：around、about、roughly、maybe、probably、working assumption。
能否识别需要追问的情况：缺 customer、缺 opportunity name、金额不一致、数量范围不明确。
能否保留 sales context：stage、close date、probability、partner、renewal、multi-year term。
